subcodes.first_line: Verily the Book itself proclaimeth and saith: O people! The All-Bountiful hath come upon the clouds. Behold ye His countenance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان الکتاب بنفسه ینادی و یقول یا قوم قد اتی الوهاب علی السحاب ان انظروا وجه
subcodes.subjects: @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @presence [liqa'] of Manifestation of God is presence of God, @thankfulness; gratitude, @wine as symbol of spiritual transformation, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
